$comment: User-level gh CLI guardrails. First-match-wins rule list. Default posture: ALLOW unmatched commands. Loaded by Gate-ShellCommands.ps1 at preToolUse time. Edit rules here; restart Copilot CLI session for changes to take effect.

rules.$comment: DENY: catastrophic — any gh repo delete is irreversible (DEF-6: promoted from ASK; GH interactive prompt is not a reliable safety net when agent is scripted)
rules.reason: Catastrophic: repository deletion is irreversible — use GitHub web UI with MFA

rules.$comment: DENY: credential exfiltration — gh auth token prints bearer token to stdout
rules.reason: Credential exfiltration: gh auth token exposes bearer token

rules.$comment: DENY: gh api with destructive HTTP methods — bypasses verb-level rules
rules.reason: gh api with mutating HTTP method bypasses command-level guardrails

rules.$comment: DENY: gh api --method with destructive verbs
rules.reason: gh api with mutating --method bypasses command-level guardrails

rules.$comment: ALLOW: read-only operations — short-circuit before ASK rules
rules.reason: Read-only operation

rules.$comment: ALLOW: gh api with GET (explicit safe method)
rules.reason: Read-only API call
Non-mutating informational command
Read-only PR operation
Read-only issue operation

rules.$comment: ASK: PR merge — significant repo-mutating action
rules.reason: PR merge modifies the target branch permanently
Closing a PR discards the review context
Archiving a repo locks it from further contributions

rules.$comment: ASK: repo edit — visibility, name, description, settings mutations (DEF-5: was uncovered, fell to default allow)
rules.reason: Repository settings change (visibility, name, topics) — confirm intent
Release mutations affect published artifacts
Secret mutations affect CI/CD security posture

rules.$comment: ASK: auth login/logout — changes credential state
rules.reason: Auth mutations affect all subsequent gh operations
Key mutations affect authentication trust chain
Workflow state mutations affect CI pipeline behavior
Run cancellation/rerun affects in-flight CI

rules.$comment: ALLOW: issue mutations — Ralph and agents manage the project board autonomously
rules.reason: Issue lifecycle management allowed for Ralph watch and agents
Repo creation/fork/rename is a significant org-level action
